Off Campus is my kind of trash - 14 minutes, 18 seconds - Go to channel Alex Meyers - Alex Meyers - 350 thousand views - 3 days ago - play video
Action menu for Off Campus is my kind of trash

children.text: Alex Meyers reviews the Amazon series Off-Campus, exploring the show's classic teen rom-com tropes and stilted dialogue. The narrative follows two university students who strike a mutually beneficial agreement to balance academic struggles with personal goals, reviving a genre of entertainment that has largely faded in recent years.
